CustomField.formula: IF(FIND( "Can we ask why?", Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c )=0, "", IF(FIND('","',Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c,FIND( "Can we ask why?", Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c )+5)=0, RIGHT(LEFT(Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c, LEN(Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c)-2), LEN(Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c)- FIND("Can we ask why?",Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c)-19) , RIGHT(LEFT(Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c , FIND('","',Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c,FIND( "Can we ask why?", Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c )+17)-1), FIND('","',Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c,FIND( "Can we ask why?", Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c )+17)-FIND( "Can we ask why?", Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c )-18) ))
CustomField.label: CancellationSurvey Why
